Vulnerabilities.Title: libfetch: integer overflow
Vulnerabilities.Description: libfetch before 2021-07-26, as used in apk-tools, suffers from an integer overflow.

Vulnerabilities.Title: lz4: memory corruption due to an integer overflow
Vulnerabilities.Description: There's a flaw in lz4. An attacker who submits a crafted file to an application linked with lz4 may be able to trigger an integer overflow.

Vulnerabilities.Title: musl libc: buffer overflow in wcsnrtombs
Vulnerabilities.Description: In musl libc through 1.2.1, wcsnrtombs mishandles particular combinations of destination buffer size and source character limit.

Vulnerabilities.Title: musl libc: x87 floating-point stack adjustment imbalance
Vulnerabilities.Description: musl libc through 1.1.23 has an x87 floating-point stack adjustment imbalance.

Vulnerabilities.Title: zstd: null-pointer dereference in ZSTD_compressBlock_matchState()
Vulnerabilities.Description: A vulnerability was found in zstd v1.4.10, where an attacker can supply empty string as an argument to the command line tool to cause buffer overrun.
